summary: The diff implements most of the requested V53 restoration across backend, frontend hooks, admin dialogs, admin pages, and the AdminOnly guard. However, several hooks and pages use local in-memory stores instead of calling real backend actor methods, which violates the core requirement of connecting to real backend data. REQ-2 is substantially not met because useProducts, useRetailers, useListings, useTowns, useCategories, useRoleApplications, useShopperApplication, useDriverApplication, and usePickupPointApplication all use local module-level arrays/maps rather than actor calls. REQ-3 admin pages for orders (AdminOrdersPage) is not visible in the diff. REQ-5 catalogue/product detail/retailer pages are not visible in the diff. The AdminOnly guard (REQ-6) appears correctly implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Restore all frontend hooks to call real backend actor methods instead of returning stubs, empty arrays, or throwing errors.
missing_requirements.reason: useProducts, useRetailers, useListings, useRoleApplications, useShopperApplication, useDriverApplication, usePickupPointApplication, useCategories, and useTowns all use local in-memory stores (module-level arrays/maps) instead of calling actor methods. None of these hooks invoke actor.createProduct, actor.getProducts, actor.createRetailer, actor.getRetailers, actor.createListing, actor.getListings, or any backend application methods.

missing_requirements.requirement: Restore AdminOrdersPage to its Version 53 implementation displaying real backend order data.
missing_requirements.reason: AdminOrdersPage is not present in the diff summary at all — it was not modified or added.

missing_requirements.requirement: Restore CataloguePage, ProductDetailPage, RetailerListPage, and RetailerCatalogPage to fetch and display real data from the backend.
missing_requirements.reason: None of these page files appear in the diff summary, so it cannot be confirmed they were restored.

hallucinated_features.description: Local in-memory stores for Products, Retailers, Listings, Towns, Categories, and role applications persist only in module memory and reset on page reload, acting as client-side stubs rather than the requested real backend integration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly requires hooks to call real backend actor methods. The diff introduces client-side in-memory arrays/maps (localProducts, localRetailers, localListings, localTowns, myShopperApplications, myDriverApplications, myPickupPointApplications) as a substitute — this is a new pattern not requested and contradicts the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: RequireApprovedDriver, RequireApprovedPickupPoint, and RequireApprovedShopper guard components were added.
hallucinated_features.reason: These components were not mentioned in the build request requirements. They may be part of V53 base but were not listed as a required deliverable in any REQ.
